speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Describe an interruption

cueCard.topic: Describe a time when something interrupted you.
bullets: and explain how you felt about it

speaking.sampleAnswer: I was cooking dinner when the phone rang suddenly. I was surprised because I wasn't expecting any calls. I felt a little annoyed, but it wasn't a big problem in the end.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Review — An unexpected story

cueCard.topic: Describe an unexpected event that happened to you.
bullets: what you were doing before it happened
how the situation was different from usual
and explain how you would react if it happened again

speaking.sampleAnswer: I was walking to the shop where I used to buy bread every morning. While I was walking, a man who I knew told me that the shop was closed. If that happened to me again, I would simply try a different shop nearby.
